.. gedcom-x documentation master file, created by
   sphinx-quickstart on Mon Aug 25 19:46:01 2025.
   You can adapt this file completely to your liking, but it should at least
   contain the root `toctree` directive.

gedcom-x 0.5.5 documentation
============================

Module for handling genealogical data in the Gedcom-X V1 `Specification <https://github.com/FamilySearch/gedcomx/blob/master/specifications/conceptual-model-specification.md>`_

* Currently in Beta, Basline GedcomX Specification is implimnet in objects for most Type Classes
* Serializtion/Deserializtion in JSON format only.
* Contains object for working with and converting, GEDCOM 5.x, and GEDCOM 7 format files and data

Currently working on
====================

* Cleaning up GEDCOM5x Objects and Conversion
* Implimenting GEDCOM 7 Objects and Conversion
* Unified Logging
* Unified documentation

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:

   TopLevel
   ComponentLevel
   Extensions
   HelperClasses
